page.title: Category talk:Buildings and structures by function and century of completion

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Category talk:Buildings and structures by type and century of completion]] to [[Category talk:Buildings and structures by Use and century of completion]]: Text replacement - "Buildings and structures by type" to "Buildings and structures by Use"
